original_code:
module TopModule (
    input wire J,
    input wire K,
    input wire CLK,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        case ({J, K})
            2'b00: Q <= Q;       // Maintain current state
            2'b01: Q <= 0;       // Reset
            2'b10: Q <= 1;       // Set
            2'b11: Q <= ~Q;      // Toggle
        endcase
    end
endmodule
adversarial_code:
module TopModule (
    input wire J,
    input wire K,
    input wire CLK,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        case ({J, K})
            2'b00: Q <= Q;       // Maintain current state
            2'b01: Q <= 0;       // Reset
            2'b10: Q <= 1;       // Set
            2'b11: Q <= ~Q;      // Toggle
        endcase
    end
endmodule
